summary: Iteration 36 - P1 Role-Specific Widgets & P2 UX Improvements. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Owner sees Crew Leaders, AM Report, Supervisor Checklist, Weekly Digest widgets. PM sees PM Dashboard widget with division-specific stats. Team Members Individual view shows sparklines on all 10 profile cards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified all P1 Role-Specific Widgets and P2 UX Improvements. Backend endpoints tested: /api/metrics/pm-dashboard (with division param), /api/metrics/crew-leader-performance (with division param), /api/metrics/account-manager-report, /api/metrics/supervisor-checklist, /api/metrics/smart-insights, /api/metrics/crew-sparklines (returns both sparklines and division_sparklines), /api/metrics/weekly-digest. Frontend widgets verified: Owner sees widget-crew-leaders (4 leaders ranked by score), widget-am-report (property quality table), widget-supervisor-checklist (4 stat boxes), widget-weekly-digest (top/bottom performers). PM sees widget-pm-dashboard with division-specific stats. Team Members Individual view shows sparkline SVGs on all profile cards using data from crew-sparklines endpoint with division_sparklines fallback for management users.

verified_features.backend_pm_dashboard_maintenance: GET /api/metrics/pm-dashboard?division=Maintenance returns 200 with submissions_30d, avg_score_90d, pass_count, fail_count, crews, training stats
verified_features.backend_crew_leader_performance_all: GET /api/metrics/crew-leader-performance?division=all returns 200 with leaders array (4 entries)
verified_features.backend_supervisor_checklist: GET /api/metrics/supervisor-checklist returns 200 with today_equipment_checks, active_crews, red_tags_this_week
verified_features.backend_crew_sparklines_all: GET /api/metrics/crew-sparklines?division=all returns 200 with sparklines AND division_sparklines objects
verified_features.backend_weekly_digest: GET /api/metrics/weekly-digest returns 200 with top_performers and bottom_performers arrays
verified_features.backend_pm_access_pm_dashboard: PM user can access PM Dashboard for their division
verified_features.backend_pm_access_crew_leader: PM user can access Crew Leader Performance
verified_features.backend_auth_required_all_endpoints: All 7 new endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
verified_features.frontend_owner_crew_leaders_widget: Owner sees widget-crew-leaders with 4 ranked crew leaders (Alejandro 4.7, Derek 4.1, Nathan 4.1, Marcus 4.0)
verified_features.frontend_owner_am_report_widget: Owner sees widget-am-report with property quality table (2 properties)
verified_features.frontend_owner_supervisor_checklist_widg: Owner sees widget-supervisor-checklist with 4 stat boxes (Equipment Checks, Submissions Today, Active Crews, Red Tags)
verified_features.frontend_owner_weekly_digest_widget: Owner sees widget-weekly-digest with top performers (Install Alpha 4.7)
verified_features.frontend_pm_dashboard_widget: PM sees widget-pm-dashboard with Maintenance Division 90 Day Snapshot (2 subs, 4.07 avg, 3 pass, 0 fail)
verified_features.frontend_pm_crew_leaders_filtered: PM sees Crew Leader Performance filtered to Maintenance division only (Derek, Marcus)
verified_features.frontend_team_members_sparklines: Team Members Individual view shows 10 sparkline SVGs on profile cards
verified_features.frontend_team_members_pagination: Team Members page shows pagination (1/3 pages)
